channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken kerb stone, 14th April
item.description:
Lowered kerb stone broken and rocking at entrance to driveway of 9 Peregrine Road, Cheltenham, GL530LW

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Peregrine Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 14th April
item.description:
Cw kerbing Lift and reset x1 dropped kerb Stats required Give and take (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 14th April
item.description:
CW pothole around ironwork 800mm x 400mm x 42mm Stats required Stop and go TM Outside number 126 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 14th April
item.description:
GIVE AND TAKE PLUS TEMPORARY FOOTWAY CLOSURE FOOTWAY POTHOLE 250x300x25mm stats required number 1 (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle has been there for months, 14th April
item.description:
Snowshill drive Bishops cleeve, near the junction with Buckland close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Snowshill Drive, Bishop's Cleeve

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 14th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Fences & Barriers problem, 14th April
item.description:
Boundary fence to River Chelt has collapsed. please make safe footway with approx 10 barriers to prevent injury to travelling pedestrians (Boundary Fence Damage)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree adjacent to houses, 14th April
item.description:
Opposite no 98 and 100 Hewlett road.I would like to request that the council consider trimming the tree adjacent to our property. The tree has grown significantly and now overshadows the house, reducing natural light. It also causes excessive leaf fall into our garden and casts heavy shade over the lawn, which has led to moss growth. In addition, the tree occasionally drops dead branches, which raises safety concerns. Pigeons frequently roost in the tree, resulting in mess on our path and surrounding areas. A reduction in the tree’s size and canopy would greatly improve light levels, garden condition, and general upkeep, while also addressing safety and cleanliness issues. Thank you for your consideration.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 102, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Its right in the middle of the road, its outside 18 Kipling Road, 14th April
item.description:
This hole has been recently filled and has now become a big hole again

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 14th April
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet
